imagePipelineSteps.name: User Upload
imagePipelineSteps.description: User uploads a raw image directly to the Amazon S3 ingestion bucket.

imagePipelineSteps.name: S3 Event Trigger
imagePipelineSteps.description: S3 detects the new object creation and automatically publishes an event notification.

imagePipelineSteps.name: Lambda Orchestration
imagePipelineSteps.description: AWS Lambda is triggered by the S3 event, extracts the metadata, and coordinates the processing layers.

imagePipelineSteps.name: Fargate Image Manipulation
imagePipelineSteps.description: For heavy image manipulation, Lambda passes tasks to a containerized Fargate task pulled from Amazon ECR.

imagePipelineSteps.name: Rekognition Analysis
imagePipelineSteps.description: Amazon Rekognition processes the image to extract descriptive properties and tags.

imagePipelineSteps.name: Data Persistence
imagePipelineSteps.description: The extracted image properties, tags, and S3 file locations are written to Amazon DynamoDB.
